author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone Showroom R2.1 Flight Instructions!

Jump into the pilot’s seat and soar through the cosmos like never before! Practice your skills, beat your previous best & race against others on the Showroom R2.1 global leaderboard!

But first…check out this video by @Ronin on how to navigate your ships! 

https://youtu.be/iZL38M2uk6s

Mentions: @Ronin
